test.details: 22 tests passed in @nivalis/utils (4 files), 73 tests passed in @nivalis/ai (8 files), @nivalis/web had no test files (passWithNoTests). Total: 95 tests.

typecheck.details: All 3 packages passed TypeScript checks via turbo ts (all cache hits)

lint.details: All 3 packages passed Biome lint checks: @nivalis/utils (12 files), @nivalis/ai (21 files), @nivalis/web (60 files). Total: 93 files.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Commit bundled .factory/research/ and .factory/skills/ files alongside AGENTS.md due to .gitignore change — expected system behavior, not a worker error
Worker skipped pnpm ts in verification — inconsequential for static config files (YAML/Markdown/CODEOWNERS not checked by TypeScript)
postCreateCommand could be more robust by prepending 'corepack enable' before 'pnpm install' to ensure pnpm availability in container
skipErrorChecking: true in typedoc.json suppresses TypeScript errors during doc generation; acceptable since pnpm ts handles type-checking separately
docs:generate script not registered in turbo.json — acceptable for on-demand command but should be added if it becomes part of CI
Branch protection ruleset has no required status checks (only PR review approval) — matches feature requirements but could be strengthened
Only npm ecosystem in dependabot.yml; github-actions ecosystem could be added separately
pnpm-workspace.yaml catalog entries (knip, syncpack, yaml) appended near end rather than in alphabetical order
large-file-check in lefthook.yml has false positive when multiple staged files' combined wc -l total exceeds 500 lines — fix: filter out 'total$' line
.jscpd.json ignore list doesn't include **/src/prisma/client/** for generated Prisma client code — may cause false duplication reports
@vitest/coverage-v8 placed out of alphabetical order in pnpm-workspace.yaml catalog (at end instead of with @-scoped packages)

appliedUpdates.description: Created .factory/library/vitest-config.md documenting Vitest 4 migration changes (poolOptions removed, maxThreads→maxWorkers, pool options now top-level) and current configuration (pool: threads, maxWorkers: 4, verbose reporter, 80% coverage thresholds)

Created .factory/library/tooling-quirks.md documenting wc -l false positive with total summary line on multi-file input, lefthook YAML quoting requirement for commands with colons, and syncpack's yaml dependency for dynamic catalog reading

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add catalog ordering convention to Dependency Management section: '@-scoped packages first (alphabetically), then unscoped packages (alphabetically) in pnpm-workspace.yaml catalog section.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features knip-syncpack and vitest-coverage-isolation-perf both placed new catalog entries out of alphabetical order. Three separate reviewer reports flagged this as an undocumented convention.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the branch protection ruleset configuration locally: 'Main branch has a GitHub ruleset (id: 13532079) requiring 1 approving review with stale review dismissal. View/modify via gh api repos/nivalis-studio/app-template/rulesets.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature dependabot-branch-protection created a remote-only ruleset with no local documentation. Future maintainers won't know the ruleset exists without checking GitHub API.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify relationship between docs/architecture.md (user-facing with Mermaid diagrams) and .factory/library/architecture.md (agent-facing knowledge) to prevent drift.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature architecture-docs-typedoc created docs/architecture.md with overlapping content to .factory/library/architecture.md. Both are accurate but independently maintained.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to readiness-worker skill: 'Lefthook YAML commands containing colons need to be quoted to avoid YAML parsing errors.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature jscpd-complexity-largefiles-todo worker reported this as a lesson learned in skillFeedback.suggestedChanges.

rejectedObservations.observation: .gitignore fix convention — already documented and followed per mission AGENTS.md
GPG signing convention — flagged by 3 reviewers (agents-md-and-docs, devcontainer, github-templates-codeowners) but already documented in mission AGENTS.md under 'IMPORTANT: GPG Signing'
devcontainer.json uses tab indentation matching Biome defaults
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — Biome tab indentation is the project default

rejectedObservations.observation: readiness-worker skill correctly followed by multiple workers
rejectedObservations.reason: Not an observation requiring action — confirmation of expected behavior
